headline: LyondellBasell (LYB) Dividend Cut and Upgrade: What Really Drives Its Petrochemical Resilience?
summary: In early March 2026, KeyBanc Capital Markets upgraded LyondellBasell Industries after highlighting how geopolitical tensions could tighten global polyethylene supply and support petrochemical producers. This upgrade follows LyondellBasell’s earlier decision to reduce its first-quarter dividend to preserve flexibility during one of the chemicals sector’s longest downturns. We’ll now assess how the analyst upgrade, tied to potential polyethylene supply tightening, influences LyondellBasell’s...
